product_overview: Luggist is an offline-first packing tracker that helps users create trips, organize bags and packing cubes, and track packing progress to 100%. All data is stored locally in the browser, making the app fast, private, and usable without a network connection.
core_goals: Create a new trip quickly and start packing within a minute
Model packing with a hierarchy of bags, packing cubes, and items
Track packing progress clearly at both trip and container levels
Make organizing fast with quick-add, bulk actions, and drag-and-drop
Support repeat trips through reusable packing templates
Keep all packing data available locally in the browser for offline use

features.name: Trip Management
features.description: Create, view, edit, and delete packing trips with trip details such as destination, dates, and notes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open trip creation -> Fill in trip name, destination, dates, and notes -> Submit the form -> See the new trip added and opened
Navigate to / -> View the trip list and summary stats -> Choose an existing trip -> See its trip details
Navigate to / -> Open a trip’s options -> Choose to edit the trip -> Update trip details -> Save changes -> See the updated trip information
Navigate to / -> Open a trip’s options -> Choose to delete the trip -> Confirm deletion -> See the trip removed from the list

features.name: Bag and Packing Cube Management
features.description: Add, edit, and remove bags and nested packing cubes to organize items within a trip.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Add a bag -> Enter a bag name and optional color -> Submit the form -> See the bag section appear in the trip
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open a bag’s actions -> Add a packing cube inside the bag -> Enter a cube name and optional color -> Submit the form -> See the cube nested under the bag
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open a bag or cube’s actions -> Edit the container details -> Save changes -> See the updated name or color
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open a bag or cube’s actions -> Delete the container -> Confirm deletion -> See the container removed and its items moved to Unassigned

features.name: Item Management
features.description: Add, edit, pack, unpack, delete, and quickly create packing items, including assigning them to containers or leaving them unassigned.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Add an item -> Enter an item name, quantity, optional category, container assignment, and notes -> Submit the form -> See the item added to the trip
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open an item for editing -> Update the item details -> Save changes -> See the item updated in place
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Mark an item as packed -> Observe the packed state update -> Mark it again to unpack it
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Delete an item -> Confirm deletion -> See the item removed from the list
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Use quick add in a container -> Enter an item name -> Submit quickly -> See the new item appear in that container

features.name: Packing Progress Tracking
features.description: Show visual progress for packed items across the whole trip and within individual bags and cubes.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> View the trip header -> Observe the packed count, total count, and percentage progress
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Pack items in containers -> Watch the overall progress increase -> Reach 100% packed and see the completion celebration
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> View a bag or cube section -> Observe the container’s own progress bar and packed count

features.name: Bulk Pack and Unpack
features.description: Mark every item in a trip as packed or unpacked in a single action from the trip menu.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open the trip options -> Choose to mark all items packed -> See every item in the trip change to packed
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open the trip options -> Choose to mark all items unpacked -> See every item in the trip reset to unpacked

features.name: Search and Category Filtering
features.description: Find items using search, category filters, packed-state filtering, and sorting options.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Type a keyword into search -> See the item list filter down to matching names
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Select one or more category filters -> See only items in those categories
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Turn on unpacked-only filtering -> See packed items hidden from the list
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Change the sort mode -> See the item order switch between manual, A-Z, and packed-last sorting

features.name: Drag-and-Drop Reordering
features.description: Reorder bags, cubes, and items by dragging them within the trip layout, including moving items between containers.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Drag an item within a container -> Drop it in a new position -> See the item order updated
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Drag an item from one container to another -> Drop it into the new container -> See the item moved
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Drag a bag or cube header -> Drop it among sibling containers -> See the container order updated
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Enable search or category filtering -> Attempt to drag items or containers -> Observe that reordering is unavailable while filtering

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create and maintain reusable global categories that can be assigned to items across trips.
user_flows: Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open category management -> Add a new category -> Enter a name and color -> Save it -> See the new category available for items
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open category management -> Select an existing category -> Edit its name or color -> Save changes -> See the category updated
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open category management -> Delete a category -> Confirm deletion -> See the category removed

features.name: Packing Templates
features.description: Browse built-in or user-created templates, apply them to trips, and save current packing lists as reusable templates.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open templates -> Browse the template library -> Select a template -> Preview its contents
Navigate to / -> Open templates -> Select a template -> Choose to use it -> Create a new trip from the template -> See a trip populated with unpacked containers and items
Navigate to /trips/[tripId] -> Open the trip options -> Save the current packing list as a template -> Enter a template name and optional description -> Save it -> See it available in templates
Navigate to / -> Open templates -> Choose a user-created template -> Delete it -> Confirm deletion -> See the template removed

features.name: Trip Dashboard and Stats
features.description: Show high-level trip counts and packing status summaries on the home screen, along with search over the trip list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the dashboard -> Observe total trips, overall packed percentage, and next trip countdown
Navigate to / -> Use the search bar -> Filter trips by name or destination -> See matching trips in the list

routes.description: Trips home — dashboard with trip list, stats, search, new trip, and templates
Trip detail view — bags, cubes, items, packing progress, drag-and-drop

features.name: Trip Management
features.description: Create, view, edit, and delete packing trips with name, destination, dates, and notes
user_interactions: Click "New trip" button to open trip creation modal
Fill trip name (required), destination, start/end dates, and notes
Submit form to create the trip and navigate to it
Click the kebab menu on a trip card to edit or delete
Confirm deletion in the confirm dialog

features.name: Bag and Packing Cube Management
features.description: Add bags (top-level containers) and packing cubes (nested inside bags) to organize items
user_interactions: Click "+ Bag" button in toolbar or "+ Add bag" dashed button
Fill bag name and optional color in the modal, submit
Click "+ Cube" inside a bag section to add a packing cube inside that bag
Click the bag/cube menu to edit name/color or delete
Confirm deletion (items inside are moved to Unassigned, not deleted)

features.name: Item Management
features.description: Add, edit, pack/unpack, and delete individual packing items; assign to bags/cubes or leave unassigned
user_interactions: Click "+ Item" button to open item form modal
Fill item name (required), quantity, optional category, container assignment, and notes
Submit form to add item
Click the checkbox on an item row to toggle packed/unpacked state
Click item name or edit icon to open edit form
Click delete icon on item row and confirm deletion
Use Quick Add inline input at the bottom of a container to rapidly add items by name

features.name: Packing Progress Tracking
features.description: Visual progress bar and percentage showing how many items are packed per trip and overall
user_interactions: View progress bar in trip header showing packed/total count and percentage
See "All packed" celebration when all items are packed
View per-container progress bars in each bag/cube section

features.name: Bulk Pack and Unpack
features.description: Mark all items in a trip as packed or unpacked in one action via the trip menu
user_interactions: Open trip options menu (kebab icon in trip header)
Click "Mark all packed" to pack every item in the trip
Click "Mark all unpacked" to reset all items to unpacked

features.name: Search and Category Filtering
features.description: Filter items by keyword search, category tags, or unpacked-only toggle; sort items A-Z, packed-last, or manually
user_interactions: Type in the search bar to filter items by name
Click category chips to toggle category filters
Toggle "Unpacked only" switch to hide packed items
Change "Sort" dropdown between Manual, A-Z, and Packed last

features.name: Drag-and-Drop Reordering
features.description: Drag items between containers or reorder bags/cubes; disabled while search/filter is active
user_interactions: Click and drag an item row to reorder within a container or move to another bag/cube
Click and drag a bag or cube header to reorder among sibling containers
Release to drop; order is persisted to IndexedDB

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create, rename, recolor, and delete global categories that can be assigned to items
user_interactions: Open trip menu then click "Manage categories"
Click add to create a new category with a name and color
Click a category row to edit name or color
Click delete icon and confirm to remove a category

features.name: Packing Templates
features.description: Browse, apply, save, and manage reusable packing list templates (built-in and user-created)
user_interactions: Click "Templates" button on the home screen to open templates
Click a template card to preview its containers and items
Click "Use template" to instantiate it into a new or existing trip
On TripView open trip menu then "Save as template" to snapshot current packing list
Fill template name and optional description, submit to save
Delete user-created templates from the manage templates screen

features.name: Trip Dashboard and Stats
features.description: Summary cards on the home screen showing total trips, overall packing progress, and next upcoming trip
user_interactions: View stat cards for total trips, items packed percentage, and next trip countdown
Use the search bar to filter the trip list by name or destination

known_limitations.issue: All data is stored client-side in IndexedDB; no backend or sync
known_limitations.impact: No cross-device persistence; data lost if browser storage is cleared

known_limitations.issue: Drag-and-drop is disabled when any search or category filter is active
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot reorder items while filtering

known_limitations.issue: Service worker offline caching only works in production build, not dev mode
known_limitations.impact: Offline behavior cannot be tested against the dev server
